# HDoujin Lua Mirror

This directory contains a local mirror of the upstream `modules/lua` set from `HDoujinDownloader`.

- Upstream project: `https://github.com/HDoujinDownloader/HDoujinDownloader`
- Mirrored contents: `modules/lua`, plus the upstream README and changelog
- Current local snapshot: 315 mirrored `.lua` modules
- Purpose inside Tanuki: compatibility input and fixture corpus for the HDoujin Lua engine

The mirrored Lua files are intentionally kept separate from Tanuki's native connectors.
